# Quick Fix: Add color field to masterVariants
Generated: 2026-04-03

## Change Made

### 1. `src/lib/excel-import.ts`
- Added `color: string` to `ProductGroup.variants` array item type
- Passed `color: row.color` in both `groupBySku()` variant pushes (new group and existing group)
- Added `color: v.color || existingVariant.color` to variant UPDATE in processExcelImport
- Added `color: v.color || null` to both variant INSERT calls in processExcelImport

### 2. `src/app/api/admin/products/route.ts`
- Added `color?: string` to `VariantInput` interface
- Passed `color: v.color?.trim() || null` to variant insert in POST handler

### 3. `src/app/api/admin/products/[id]/route.ts`
- Added `color?: string` to inline variant type in PUT handler
- Passed `color: v.color?.trim() ?? null` to variant UPDATE
- Passed `color: v.color?.trim() ?? null` to variant INSERT

### 4. `src/app/admin/products/[id]/page.tsx`
- Added `color: string | null` to `Variant` interface
- Added "Renk" `<th>` column header in variants table
- Added `<td>{v.color || "-"}</td>` cell in variant rows

### 5. `src/app/admin/products/[id]/edit/page.tsx`
- Added `color: string` to `VariantRow` interface
- Added `color: string | null` to `ApiVariant` interface
- Added `color: ""` to `createEmptyVariant()`
- Passed `color: v.color || ""` when loading variants from API
- Passed `color: v.color.trim() || null` in PUT payload
- Added "Renk" `<th>` column header in variants table
- Added Renk text input cell per variant row

### 6. `src/app/admin/products/new/page.tsx`
- Added `color: string` to `VariantRow` interface
- Added `color: ""` to `createEmptyVariant()`
- Passed `color: v.color.trim() || null` in POST payload
- Added "Renk" `<th>` column header in variants table
- Added Renk text input cell per variant row

### 7. `src/app/admin/products/page.tsx` - No change needed (aggregate list, no variant-level color)
### 8. `src/app/panel/products/page.tsx` - No change needed (aggregate view)
### 9. `src/app/panel/products/new/page.tsx` - No change needed (product push flow, color already shown at product level)

## Verification
- Build: PASS (compiled successfully, types valid)
- DYNAMIC_SERVER_USAGE warnings are pre-existing, unrelated to this change

## Files Modified
1. `src/lib/excel-import.ts` - color field propagated through import pipeline
2. `src/app/api/admin/products/route.ts` - color in POST variant insert
3. `src/app/api/admin/products/[id]/route.ts` - color in PUT variant update/insert
4. `src/app/admin/products/[id]/page.tsx` - Renk column in detail view
5. `src/app/admin/products/[id]/edit/page.tsx` - Renk input in edit form
6. `src/app/admin/products/new/page.tsx` - Renk input in new product form
